name: family-ledger-google-sheets
description: Google Sheets client tooling for family-ledger

scripts.check: eslint AccountsSheet.js Api.js App.js Constants.js DoctorIssues.js Filters.js ImporterDialog.js LedgerSync.js Settings.js SheetLayout.js TransactionEdits.js TransactionSave.js TransactionsSheet.js
scripts.push: for f in .clasp.local.json .clasp.syniukas.json; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then clasp push --force --project "$f"; fi; done
